sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97778" key="sugke/ntrwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκέντρωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Astron., <sense id="n97778.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a simultaneous relation of centres</tr_>, i.e. when the sun's centre is at that point of the ecliptic which rises, sets, or culminates coincidently with the rising, etc., of a given star, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.5</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
